<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ramil Kazimov — Geopolitical Risk &amp; Intelligence Advisory</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300&family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg:     #0a0e1a;
  --bg2:    #0f1525;
  --bg3:    #141c2e;
  --panel:  #1a2338;
  --gold:   #c49a3c;
  --gold2:  #e8c06a;
  --gold3:  rgba(196,154,60,0.12);
  --border: rgba(196,154,60,0.18);
  --border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  --text:   #cdd6e0;
  --text2:  #8fa0b4;
  --white:  #f0f4f8;
  --teal:   #2a8a7a;
  --sage:   #4a7a5a;
  --rust:   #c4603a;
  --display:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;
  --body:   'Libre Baskerville',Georgia,serif;
  --sans:   'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--sans);font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}

/* scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold);border-radius:2px}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:900;height:56px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 3.5rem;background:rgba(10,14,26,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.nbrand{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.02em}
.nbrand em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
.nlinks{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:2rem}
.nlinks a{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;position:relative}
.nlinks a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--gold);transition:width .25s}
.nlinks a:hover,.nlinks a.on{color:var(--gold)}
.nlinks a:hover::after,.nlinks a.on::after{width:100%}

/* HERO */
.hero{padding-top:56px;min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

/* grid lines background */
.hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(196,154,60,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(196,154,60,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;pointer-events:none}

.hero-l{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:7rem 4rem 7rem 5rem;position:relative;z-index:1}

.hero-scan{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;animation:fu .8s .1s both}
.hero-scan::before{content:'';width:40px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold))}
.hero-scan .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(.7)}}

.hero-l h1{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(3rem,5vw,4.8rem);font-weight:300;line-height:1.05;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.3rem;animation:fu .8s .15s both}
.hero-l h1 strong{font-weight:600;display:block}
.hero-l h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}

.hero-pos{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);margin:1.4rem 0 2.4rem;animation:fu .8s .2s both}

.hero-statement{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1.1rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);line-height:1.8;border-left:2px solid var(--gold);padding-left:1.4rem;max-width:440px;margin-bottom:2.8rem;animation:fu .8s .25s both}

.hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.45rem;margin-bottom:2.8rem;animation:fu .8s .3s both}
.chip{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.06em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);border:1px solid rgba(196,154,60,.25);padding:.28rem .75rem;background:rgba(196,154,60,.06)}

.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:1rem;animation:fu .8s .35s both}
.cta{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;padding:.72rem 1.7rem;border:1px solid;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;display:inline-block}
.cta-gold{background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);border-color:var(--gold)}
.cta-gold:hover{background:var(--gold2);border-color:var(--gold2)}
.cta-ghost{background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.18)}
.cta-ghost:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);color:#fff}

/* HERO RIGHT — PHOTO + STATS */
.hero-r{position:relative;z-index:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:5rem 5rem 5rem 3rem;gap:1.5rem;animation:fi .9s .4s both}

.photo-frame{position:relative;align-self:flex-start;margin-bottom:1rem}
.photo-frame img{width:200px;height:200px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border-radius:2px;display:block;filter:grayscale(8%);border:2px solid var(--border)}
.photo-frame::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-8px;left:-8px;right:8px;bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;pointer-events:none}
.photo-frame::after{content:'RAMIL KAZIMOV';position:absolute;bottom:-1.8rem;left:0;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.58rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);white-space:nowrap}

.stat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-top:2.5rem}
.stat-cell{background:var(--bg2);padding:1.4rem 1.5rem;transition:background .2s}
.stat-cell:hover{background:var(--bg3)}
.stat-n{font-family:var(--display);font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.stat-l{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.66rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2)}

/* SHARED */
.wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 5rem}
.sec{padding:5.5rem 0}
.sec-alt{background:var(--bg2);padding:5.5rem 0}
.sec-sand{background:var(--bg3);padding:5.5rem 0}

.sh{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:3.5rem;padding-bottom:1.2rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.sh h2{font-family:var(--display);font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1}
.sh h2 strong{font-style:normal;font-weight:600}
.sh-num{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);white-space:nowrap;margin-left:auto}

/* ABOUT */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.15fr .85fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
.about-text p{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.93rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:1.3rem}
.about-text strong{color:var(--white)}
.about-text em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
.albl{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.5rem;margin-top:1.6rem;display:block}
.albl:first-child{margin-top:0}
.hrow{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem;margin-top:.6rem}
.hobby{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:.28rem .8rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}

.aside-mission{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--panel),var(--bg3));border:1px solid var(--border);padding:2.2rem 2.4rem;margin-bottom:1.4rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.aside-mission::before{content:'"';font-family:var(--display);font-size:10rem;color:rgba(196,154,60,.08);position:absolute;top:-2rem;left:.5rem;line-height:1;pointer-events:none}
.aside-lbl{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.aside-txt{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1.08rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.8}
.aside-panel{border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.7rem 1.9rem;background:var(--panel);margin-bottom:1.4rem}
.prop-li{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.86rem;color:var(--text);padding-left:1.1rem;position:relative;margin-bottom:.6rem;line-height:1.6}
.prop-li::before{content:'›';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--gold)}
.rtag{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.63rem;color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:.18rem .5rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);display:inline-block;margin:.2rem .15rem}

/* EXPERIENCE TRACKS */
.track-banner{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;padding:.5rem 1.1rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;border-left:3px solid}
.track-geo{color:#7aaccc;border-color:#7aaccc;background:rgba(122,172,204,.07)}
.track-edu{color:#6abba0;border-color:#6abba0;background:rgba(106,187,160,.07)}
.track-ngo{color:#8aaa7a;border-color:#8aaa7a;background:rgba(138,170,122,.07)}

.eit{display:grid;grid-template-columns:210px 1fr;gap:3rem;padding:2.5rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);transition:background .2s}
.eit:hover{background:rgba(196,154,60,.02)}
.em{}
.edt{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.67rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.45rem;display:block}
.eorg{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.eloc{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text2)}
.etype{display:inline-block;margin-top:.6rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.56rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.16rem .55rem;border:1px solid}
.t-geo{color:#7aaccc;border-color:rgba(122,172,204,.3);background:rgba(122,172,204,.06)}
.t-edu{color:#6abba0;border-color:rgba(106,187,160,.3);background:rgba(106,187,160,.06)}
.t-ngo{color:#8aaa7a;border-color:rgba(138,170,122,.3);background:rgba(138,170,122,.06)}
.t-res{color:#c49a6a;border-color:rgba(196,154,106,.3);background:rgba(196,154,106,.06)}

.erole{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.9rem;line-height:1.2}
.ebody ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem}
.ebody li{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.88rem;color:var(--text);padding-left:1.2rem;position:relative;line-height:1.7}
.ebody li::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:.68em;width:6px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}

.disc{margin-top:2rem;padding:1.1rem 1.5rem;border:1px solid rgba(196,154,60,.2);background:rgba(196,154,60,.04);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:.9rem}
.disc p{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.84rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.65}

/* PUBLICATIONS */
.pgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.pub{background:var(--bg2);padding:1.5rem 1.7rem;transition:background .18s;cursor:default}
.pub:hover{background:var(--bg3)}
.pcat{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.57rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.4rem;display:block}
.ptit{font-family:var(--display);font-size:.98rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:var(--white);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.pven{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.67rem;color:var(--text2)}
.plnk{display:inline-block;margin-top:.45rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.64rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.04em}
.plnk:hover{color:var(--gold2)}
.pregrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem}
.pres{border-left:2px solid var(--gold);border-top:1px solid var(--border2);border-right:1px solid var(--border2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.1rem 1.4rem;background:var(--panel);transition:border-left-color .2s}
.pres:hover{border-left-color:var(--gold2)}
.pretit{font-family:var(--display);font-size:.94rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--white);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.premeta{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text2)}

/* CERTIFICATIONS */
.cgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.2rem}
.cc{border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.6rem 1.7rem;background:var(--panel);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.cc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),var(--gold2))}
.cc:hover{border-color:rgba(196,154,60,.4);box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(196,154,60,.08)}
.ciss{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.5rem;display:block}
.cname{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.cmeta{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5}
.cid{display:block;margin-top:.5rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.58rem;color:rgba(196,154,60,.5);letter-spacing:.05em}

/* SKILLS */
.kgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.3rem}
.kc{border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.7rem;background:var(--panel);transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s}
.kc:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.kh{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-bottom:.7rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)}
.tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem}
.tag{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.64rem;color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:.18rem .5rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}

/* EDUCATION */
.egrid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.3rem;margin-bottom:2.3rem}
.ec{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.9rem 2.1rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ec::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--bg3))}
.eyr{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.45rem}
.edeg{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.25rem;line-height:1.3}
.esch{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.73rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em}
.edet{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.82rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.65}

.tlist{border:1px solid var(--border2);overflow:hidden}
.ti{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem;padding:.95rem 1.7rem;background:var(--panel);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);transition:background .18s}
.ti:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ti:hover{background:var(--bg3)}
.tyr{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:64px;letter-spacing:.06em}
.tdot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.tn{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.87rem;color:var(--text)}

/* SERVICE */
.svgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem}
.svc{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.4rem 1.6rem}
.svr{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.2rem}
.svo{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.svd{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.83rem;color:var(--text2);font-style:italic;line-height:1.65}

/* AWARDS */
.awgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1rem}
.aw{border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.5rem 1.3rem;text-align:center;background:var(--panel);transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.aw:hover{border-color:rgba(196,154,60,.4);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(196,154,60,.1)}
.awst{font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.55rem;display:block}
.awn{font-family:var(--display);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.awo{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.63rem;color:var(--text2)}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:var(--bg);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:5rem 5rem 4rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:4rem;align-items:end}
.ftl h3{font-family:var(--display);font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.ftl h3 strong{font-weight:600;font-style:normal}
.ftl p{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.73rem;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.ftlinks{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.ftlinks a{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .2s}
.ftlinks a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.ftr p{font-family:var(--body);font-size:.84rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:.9rem;text-align:right}
.ftcopy{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.58rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.18);letter-spacing:.06em;text-align:right}

.div{width:100%;height:1px;background:var(--border2);max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto}

@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fi{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.r{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.r.v{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

@media(max-width:960px){
  .hero,.about-grid,.egrid2{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-r{padding:3rem 2rem}
  .hero-l{padding:4rem 2rem}
  .wrap{padding:0 1.5rem}
  .eit{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:.8rem}
  .pgrid,.pregrid,.cgrid,.kgrid,.svgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .awgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  nav .nlinks{display:none}
  footer{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:3rem 1.5rem}
  .ftr p,.ftcopy{text-align:left}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a class="nbrand" href="#">Ramil <em>Kazimov</em></a>
  <ul class="nlinks">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#research">Research</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#awards">Awards</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-l">
    <div class="hero-scan"><span class="dot"></span> Available for Senior Advisory &amp; Intelligence Roles</div>
    <h1>
      <strong>Ramil</strong>
      <em>Kazimov</em>
    </h1>
    <div class="hero-pos">Geopolitical Risk Advisor &nbsp;·&nbsp; Protective Intelligence &nbsp;·&nbsp; OSINT Analyst</div>
    <p class="hero-statement">Specialising in all-source analysis, threat assessment, and executive-level intelligence reporting — with a decade of operational experience across the South Caucasus, Middle East, and Eastern Europe.</p>
    <div class="hero-chips">
      <span class="chip">Threat Assessment</span>
      <span class="chip">OSINT &amp; HUMINT</span>
      <span class="chip">Executive Briefings</span>
      <span class="chip">Stakeholder Mapping</span>
      <span class="chip">Insider Threat</span>
      <span class="chip">British Embassy · IREX</span>
      <span class="chip">Fulbright Fellow</span>
      <span class="chip">4 Languages</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rkazimov/" target="_blank" class="cta cta-gold">LinkedIn ↗</a>
      <a href="#about" class="cta cta-ghost">View Profile ↓</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-r">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ramil Kazimov">
    </div>
    <div class="stat-row">
      <div class="stat-cell"><div class="stat-n">10+</div><div class="stat-l">Years Advisory</div></div>
      <div class="stat-cell"><div class="stat-n">12+</div><div class="stat-l">Publications</div></div>
      <div class="stat-cell"><div class="stat-n">3×</div><div class="stat-l">State Dept. Fellow</div></div>
      <div class="stat-cell"><div class="stat-n">4</div><div class="stat-l">Languages</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="sec" id="about">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>About</strong> Ramil</h2><span class="sh-num">01 — Profile</span></div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text r">
        <span class="albl">Roots &amp; Identity</span>
        <p>Born and raised in <strong>Lankaran, Azerbaijan</strong> — a city on the Caspian coast near the Iranian border — Ramil grew up as a member of the <strong>Talish ethnic minority</strong>, one of the region's oldest indigenous communities. Navigating a layered cultural landscape from an early age gave him something few classrooms can teach: <em>the ability to read a room, earn trust across divides, and find common ground where others see friction.</em> Those instincts, forged under real stakes, are the foundation of everything he does professionally.</p>

        <span class="albl">Professional Philosophy</span>
        <p>Ramil's work has always orbited a single question: <em>how do you translate a complicated world into something a decision-maker can act on?</em> Whether producing assessments for Ambassadors, advising NGOs in sensitive environments, or teaching American history to 9th graders — the skill is the same. <strong>Clarity under complexity.</strong> That thread runs through every chapter of his career.</p>

        <span class="albl">Diversity &amp; Inclusion</span>
        <p>His commitment to inclusive environments isn't a professional stance — it's lived experience. From championing underrepresented voices in Azerbaijani civil society to leading diverse graduate seminars at Texas A&amp;M and mentoring international fellows through U.S. State Department programs, inclusion has been a constant, not a chapter.</p>

        <span class="albl">Beyond Work</span>
        <div class="hrow">
          <span class="hobby">⚽ Soccer</span>
          <span class="hobby">🎾 Tennis</span>
          <span class="hobby">👨‍👧 Fatherhood</span>
          <span class="hobby">📚 Lifelong Learning</span>
        </div>
        <p style="margin-top:.9rem;font-family:var(--body);font-size:.86rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--text2)">Outside the office, Ramil is most often on the soccer pitch, the tennis court, or cheering his daughter through her studies — nurturing the next generation of curious, mindful thinkers.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="r">
        <div class="aside-mission">
          <div class="aside-lbl">Mission Statement</div>
          <div class="aside-txt">To help organisations navigate the political, cultural, and security dimensions of a complex world — turning strategic uncertainty into actionable advantage.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="aside-panel">
          <div class="aside-lbl" style="margin-bottom:1rem">What Sets Him Apart</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Advisory trusted by Ambassadors, Ministries &amp; NGO executives at the highest levels</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Rare combination of academic rigour, published research, and field-level operational experience</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Native operational fluency in regions most firms treat as secondary markets</div>
          <div class="prop-li">DCSA-certified in insider threat awareness and counterintelligence</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Published author on grand strategy, deterrence &amp; energy security</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Three competitive U.S. State Department fellowships</div>
          <div class="prop-li">Educator bringing geopolitical context into the American classroom</div>
        </div>
        <div class="aside-panel">
          <div class="aside-lbl" style="margin-bottom:.8rem">Regional Expertise</div>
          <div>
            <span class="rtag">South Caucasus</span><span class="rtag">Caspian Basin</span><span class="rtag">Persian Gulf</span><span class="rtag">Middle East</span><span class="rtag">Eastern Europe</span><span class="rtag">Central Asia</span><span class="rtag">Americas</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div"></div>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section class="sec-alt" id="experience">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>Professional</strong> Experience</h2><span class="sh-num">02 — Track Record</span></div>

    <!-- GEOPOLITICAL ADVISORY -->
    <div class="track-banner track-geo r">⬡ Geopolitical Risk &amp; Advisory</div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Feb 2024 – Jun 2025</span><div class="eorg">Independent Consultancy</div><div class="eloc">College Station, TX · USA</div><span class="etype t-geo">Advisory</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Political &amp; Geopolitical Risk Consultant</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Advised corporate and NGO clients on geopolitical dynamics and political risk across the Americas, Eastern Europe, and the Middle East</li>
          <li>Developed stakeholder and influence network analysis to support executive decision-making and risk mitigation planning</li>
          <li>Produced concise, actionable briefings for C-suite and board-level audiences navigating complex operating environments</li>
          <li>Provided protective intelligence advisory to organisations with personnel in politically sensitive or high-risk regions</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Feb 2022 – Dec 2023</span><div class="eorg">IREX — International Research &amp; Exchanges Board</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan · USAID-Funded</div><span class="etype t-geo">Advisory</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Senior Partnership Manager</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Led risk monitoring and situational awareness for a USAID-funded programme operating across sensitive environments in the South Caucasus</li>
          <li>Conducted environmental scanning and actor mapping to inform personnel safety and programme continuity</li>
          <li>Authored periodic risk reports enabling leadership to take proactive mitigation action</li>
          <li>Translated complex regional dynamics into clear strategic recommendations for senior leadership</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">May 2020 – Aug 2020</span><div class="eorg">Middle East Institute</div><div class="eloc">Washington, DC · USA</div><span class="etype t-res">Research</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Research Analyst — Political &amp; Security Affairs</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Produced policy research and regional analysis on political, military, and economic developments across the Persian Gulf and Middle East</li>
          <li>Conducted open-source monitoring and strategic analysis on energy security and the geopolitics of gas supply agreements</li>
          <li>Contributed findings to senior editorial and research teams for executive-level publications and policy briefs</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Feb 2015 – Aug 2019</span><div class="eorg">British Embassy — HM Government</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-geo">Advisory</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Diplomatic &amp; Defence Advisory — Attaché Office</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Provided analytical and advisory support to Ambassadors and senior diplomatic leadership, producing regular assessments of the regional security and political environment across the South Caucasus</li>
          <li>Monitored open-source channels and regional networks to identify emerging risks affecting embassy operations and official visitors</li>
          <li>Drafted travel and event risk assessments for ministerial-level visits and military delegation travel</li>
          <li>Supported a time-critical diplomatic coordination effort involving multiple stakeholders under significant time pressure</li>
          <li>Developed early warning processes that improved the team's ability to anticipate and act ahead of developing situations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="disc r"><span style="color:var(--gold);font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:.05rem">🔒</span><p>Certain engagements and operational details are intentionally generalised out of professional discretion. Fuller context, work samples, and references are available upon request.</p></div>

    <!-- EDUCATION & TEACHING -->
    <div class="track-banner track-edu r" style="margin-top:3.5rem">⬡ Education &amp; Teaching</div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Jul 2025 – Present</span><div class="eorg">Étoile Academy Charter School</div><div class="eloc">Houston, TX · USA</div><span class="etype t-edu">Education</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Social Studies Teacher — U.S. History (to 1877)</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Designs and delivers engaging curriculum in U.S. History, contextualising American founding ideals, democratic development, and key historical turning points</li>
          <li>Brings a uniquely international perspective to American history — drawing on first-hand experience in diplomacy, geopolitics, and cross-cultural dynamics to make history tangible</li>
          <li>Creates an inclusive, inquiry-driven classroom that encourages critical thinking and civic engagement</li>
          <li>Develops lesson plans connecting historical events to contemporary questions of governance, equity, and social responsibility</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">2009 – 2010</span><div class="eorg">SOS Children's Village</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-edu">Education</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">ESL Instructor — 9th–11th Grade</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Developed and delivered ESL curriculum achieving an 80% improvement in student engagement and comprehension</li>
          <li>Created a supportive, inclusive classroom that fostered confidence among vulnerable youth</li>
          <li>70% of students met language learning benchmarks through regular assessment and personalised support</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">2019 – 2021</span><div class="eorg">Bush School · Texas A&amp;M University</div><div class="eloc">College Station, TX · USA</div><span class="etype t-edu">Education</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Discussion Leader — Graduate Level</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Led graduate seminars in International Relations Theory, Grand Strategy, Contemporary Middle East Politics, and U.S. Foreign Policy</li>
          <li>Facilitated discussion-based learning, translating complex academic concepts into clear, debatable frameworks</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CIVIL SOCIETY -->
    <div class="track-banner track-ngo r" style="margin-top:3.5rem">⬡ Civil Society &amp; Community Development</div>

    <p class="r" style="font-family:var(--body);font-size:.86rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:1.5rem;padding-left:1rem;border-left:2px solid var(--border2)">The roles below reflect Ramil's parallel commitment to civil society development, good governance, and community empowerment — outside the advisory track.</p>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">2014 (Contract)</span><div class="eorg">Oxfam</div><div class="eloc">Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-ngo">Consulting</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Consultant — Food Security &amp; Civil Society</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Developed baseline research on Azerbaijan's food security strategies, policies, and practices for Oxfam's policy formulation and strategic planning</li>
          <li>Reviewed gender equity and underserved communities, identifying systemic barriers to food security access</li>
          <li>Evaluated the capacities of 20 agrarian-oriented NGOs and media outlets, examining their food security advocacy approaches</li>
          <li>Produced policy recommendations advocating for inclusive, gender-sensitive national strategies and increased civil society representation</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Oct 2012 – Jun 2014</span><div class="eorg">Economic Research Center (ERC)</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-ngo">Civil Society</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Project Manager</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Implemented a programme covering 18 non-state think tanks, achieving an 80% increase in institutional capacity and establishing the Azerbaijan Think Tank Alliance</li>
          <li>Engaged stakeholders in government decision-making processes, fostering active civil society participation</li>
          <li>Managed project budgets resulting in 78% of think tanks raising 25% of their budgets from local sources</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Sep 2009 – Jun 2011</span><div class="eorg">Economic Research Center (ERC)</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-ngo">Civil Society</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">External Relations Officer</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Led ERC's communication strategy, achieving an 80% increase in engagement with international partners including PASOS and the European Association for Local Democracy</li>
          <li>Improved social media engagement by 70% through targeted advocacy campaigns</li>
          <li>Contributed to advocacy materials leading to a campaign involving 35 local civil society organisations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="eit r">
      <div class="em"><span class="edt">Aug 2008 – Aug 2009</span><div class="eorg">"Hayat" International Humanitarian Org.</div><div class="eloc">Baku, Azerbaijan</div><span class="etype t-ngo">Humanitarian</span></div>
      <div class="ebody">
        <div class="erole">Project Assistant</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Assisted in "The Social Impact Assessment of Refugees from the Nagorno-Karabakh Conflict," contributing to timely milestone delivery</li>
          <li>Facilitated communication between project teams, stakeholders, and refugee communities — improving collaboration by 30%</li>
          <li>Translated key project documents into English to enhance donor understanding of findings and outcomes</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<div class="div"></div>

<!-- RESEARCH -->
<section class="sec" id="research">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>Publications</strong> &amp; Research</h2><span class="sh-num">03 — Thought Leadership</span></div>
    <div class="pgrid r">
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Grand Strategy · 2021</span><div class="ptit">A New Look at Deterrence — Attacks on Iran and the Karabakh War and Next Generation Warfare</div><div class="pven">Albritton Center for Grand Strategy, Bush School</div><a href="https://bush.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/Kazimov-CGS-Final-A-New-Look-At-Deterrence.pdf" target="_blank" class="plnk">↗ Read Paper</a></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">U.S. Foreign Policy · 2021</span><div class="ptit">Iran's Relationships with China &amp; Russia: Implications for U.S. Foreign Policy</div><div class="pven">Bush School — Capstone Project</div></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Policy Paper · 2021</span><div class="ptit">Softening US Policy Towards Iran in the Persian Gulf and its Regional Implications</div><div class="pven">Bush School of Government &amp; Public Service</div></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Technology &amp; Strategy · 2021</span><div class="ptit">Armed Unmanned Aerial Vehicles and Their Relevance for Strategic Requirements</div><div class="pven">Bush School of Government &amp; Public Service</div></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Grand Strategy · 2020</span><div class="ptit">Why the US Should Have a New Grand Strategy for the Middle East</div><div class="pven">Albritton Center for Grand Strategy, Bush School</div><a href="https://bush.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/KazimovMiddleEast.pdf" target="_blank" class="plnk">↗ Read Paper</a></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Grand Strategy · 2020</span><div class="ptit">The U.S. and the Middle East: Re-visiting American Vital National Interests and Military Might</div><div class="pven">Albritton Center for Grand Strategy, Bush School</div><a href="https://bush.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/Revisiting-American-interest-and-military_NEW.pdf" target="_blank" class="plnk">↗ Read Paper</a></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">European Security · 2020</span><div class="ptit">Why is France Alarmed at the US Withdrawal from Africa</div><div class="pven">European Horizons — Texas A&amp;M Chapter</div><a href="https://europeanhorizonstamu.home.blog/2020/02/05/why-is-france-alarmed-at-the-us-withdrawal-from-africa/" target="_blank" class="plnk">↗ Read Paper</a></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Energy Security · 2020</span><div class="ptit">Strategic Analysis of Gas Supply Contracts: Turkey, Russia, Iran, and Azerbaijan</div><div class="pven">Middle East Institute</div></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">EU Policy · 2019</span><div class="ptit">The EU's Global Strategy and the Middle East: A Need to Address Root Causes</div><div class="pven">European Horizons — Texas A&amp;M Chapter</div><a href="https://europeanhorizonstamu.home.blog/2020/01/17/the-eus-global-strategy-and-the-middle-east-a-need-to-address-root-causes/" target="_blank" class="plnk">↗ Read Paper</a></div>
      <div class="pub"><span class="pcat">Policy Research · 2019</span><div class="ptit">Lost in Cairo: Egypt's Long Unresolved Youth Unemployment Problem</div><div class="pven">Bush School of Government &amp; Public Service</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sh r" style="margin-top:4rem"><h2><strong>Conference</strong> Presentations</h2><span class="sh-num">03b</span></div>
    <div class="pregrid r">
      <div class="pres"><div class="pretit">Media Networks and Information Warfare: Combating Propaganda and Disinformation in Autocratic Regimes</div><div class="premeta">2023 · Gabala, Azerbaijan · with E. Huseynzade</div></div>
      <div class="pres"><div class="pretit">Identifying Disinformation: Practical Tips and Tools for Fact-Checking</div><div class="premeta">2022 · Edmund S. Muskie Alumni Conference · Tbilisi, Georgia</div></div>
      <div class="pres"><div class="pretit">How to Improve the Control Function of the Supervisory Board of the State Oil Fund of Azerbaijan</div><div class="premeta">2014 · Baku, Azerbaijan</div></div>
      <div class="pres"><div class="pretit">Enhancing Government Effectiveness by Strengthening the Role of Think Tanks in Decision-making</div><div class="premeta">2012 · Baku, Azerbaijan</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div"></div>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section class="sec-alt" id="skills">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>Skills</strong> &amp; Competencies</h2><span class="sh-num">05 — Capabilities</span></div>
    <div class="kgrid r">
      <div class="kc"><div class="kh">Intelligence &amp; Analysis</div><div class="tags"><span class="tag">Open-Source Research (OSINT)</span><span class="tag">HUMINT</span><span class="tag">All-Source Analysis</span><span class="tag">Threat Actor Profiling</span><span class="tag">Insider Threat Analysis</span><span class="tag">Social Media Monitoring</span></div></div>
      <div class="kc"><div class="kh">Risk &amp; Protective Intelligence</div><div class="tags"><span class="tag">Geopolitical Risk Assessment</span><span class="tag">Stakeholder Mapping</span><span class="tag">Travel Risk Assessment</span><span class="tag">Protective Intelligence</span><span class="tag">Early Warning Analysis</span><span class="tag">Counterintelligence Awareness</span></div></div>

      <div class="kc"><div class="kh">Tools &amp; Platforms</div><div class="tags"><span class="tag">LexisNexis</span><span class="tag">Flashpoint</span><span class="tag">Social Media Platforms</span><span class="tag">Network Mapping</span><span class="tag">Google Business Intelligence</span><span class="tag">Microsoft 365</span></div></div>
      <div class="kc"><div class="kh">Reporting &amp; Communication</div><div class="tags"><span class="tag">Executive Briefings</span><span class="tag">Ambassadorial Reporting</span><span class="tag">Intelligence Writing</span><span class="tag">Policy Research</span><span class="tag">Academic Publishing</span><span class="tag">Curriculum Design</span></div></div>
      <div class="kc"><div class="kh">Languages</div><div class="tags"><span class="tag">English — Fluent</span><span class="tag">Azerbaijani — Native</span><span class="tag">Turkish — Fluent</span><span class="tag">Russian — Proficient</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div"></div>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section class="sec" id="education">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>Education</strong></h2><span class="sh-num">06 — Academic Background</span></div>
    <div class="egrid2 r">
      <div class="ec">
        <div class="eyr">2019 – 2021</div>
        <div class="edeg">Master of International Affairs — National Security &amp; Diplomacy</div>
        <div class="esch">The Bush School · Texas A&amp;M University</div>
        <div class="edet">Coursework: The Role of Intelligence in Security Affairs · Defense Intelligence<br><br>Instructors: <strong style="color:var(--white)">James M. Olson</strong>, former Chief of Counterintelligence, CIA &nbsp;·&nbsp; <strong style="color:var(--white)">Col. Matt Gill</strong>, U.S. Army (Ret.)</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ec">
        <div class="eyr">2006 – 2010</div>
        <div class="edeg">Bachelor of Arts — International Relations</div>
        <div class="esch">Baku Slavic University · Baku, Azerbaijan</div>
        <div class="edet">Grounding in international law, diplomacy, comparative politics, and regional affairs across Eurasia and the post-Soviet space.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="sh r" style="margin-top:3.5rem"><h2><strong>Defence</strong> &amp; Security Training</h2><span class="sh-num">06b</span></div>
    <div class="tlist r">
      <div class="ti"><span class="tyr">Feb 2020</span><div class="tdot"></div><span class="tn">International Strategic Crisis Negotiation Exercise — U.S. Army War College</span></div>
      <div class="ti"><span class="tyr">Jun 2019</span><div class="tdot"></div><span class="tn">European Security and Defense College — Stadtschlaining, Austria</span></div>
      <div class="ti"><span class="tyr">May 2018</span><div class="tdot"></div><span class="tn">Stockholm Forum on Peace and Development — Stockholm, Sweden</span></div>
      <div class="ti"><span class="tyr">Feb 2018</span><div class="tdot"></div><span class="tn">Managing Defence in the Wider Security Context — Tbilisi, Georgia</span></div>
      <div class="ti"><span class="tyr">Jul 2007</span><div class="tdot"></div><span class="tn">NATO International School of Azerbaijan — Baku, Azerbaijan</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="sh r" style="margin-top:3.5rem"><h2><strong>Community</strong> &amp; Academic Service</h2><span class="sh-num">06c</span></div>
    <div class="svgrid r">
      <div class="svc"><div class="svr">Non-Voting Board Member</div><div class="svo">Community Foundations of the Brazos Valley · 2020–2021</div><div class="svd">Advised the Board of Trustees on governance, grant-making, and community campaigns including the annual Brazos Valley Gives Day.</div></div>
      <div class="svc"><div class="svr">Professional Mentor</div><div class="svo">Edmund S. Muskie Fellowship Program · 2021</div><div class="svd">Mentored an international fellow through career exploration, professional skills development, and the U.S. job search process.</div></div>
      <div class="svc"><div class="svr">Civic Education Mentor</div><div class="svo">American Councils for International Education · 2005</div><div class="svd">Delivered civic education and democracy programming to secondary school students in Lankaran, promoting human rights and cross-cultural understanding.</div></div>
      <div class="svc"><div class="svr">Graduate Discussion Leader</div><div class="svo">Bush School · Texas A&amp;M · 2019–2021</div><div class="svd">Led graduate seminars in International Relations Theory, Grand Strategy, Middle East Politics, and U.S. Foreign Policy.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="div"></div>

<!-- AWARDS -->
<section class="sec-alt" id="awards">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sh r"><h2><strong>Honors</strong> &amp; Awards</h2><span class="sh-num">07 — Recognition</span></div>
    <div class="awgrid r">
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Fulbright Foreign Student Program</div><div class="awo">U.S. Department of State · 2019</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Edmund S. Muskie Professional Fellowship</div><div class="awo">U.S. Department of State · 2020</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Dean's Leadership Certificate</div><div class="awo">Bush School · Texas A&amp;M · 2021</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Medal of Excellence Award</div><div class="awo">Bush School · Texas A&amp;M · 2021</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Bush Board Fellow Award</div><div class="awo">Center for Nonprofits &amp; Philanthropy · 2020</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Bush School Scholarship</div><div class="awo">Bush School · Texas A&amp;M · 2019</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Junior Research Fellowship</div><div class="awo">Caucasus Research Resource Center · 2014</div></div>
      <div class="aw"><span class="awst">✦</span><div class="awn">Future Leaders Exchange (FLEX)</div><div class="awo">U.S. Department of State · 2004</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer id="contact">
  <div class="ftl">
    <h3><strong>Ramil</strong> Kazimov</h3>
    <p>Geopolitical Risk · Protective Intelligence · Educator · Houston &amp; College Station, TX</p>
    <div class="ftlinks">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rkazimov/" target="_blank">↗ LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://bush.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/Kazimov-CGS-Final-A-New-Look-At-Deterrence.pdf" target="_blank">↗ Deterrence Paper</a>
      <a href="https://bush.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/KazimovMiddleEast.pdf" target="_blank">↗ Middle East Strategy</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ftr">
    <p>Detailed work samples, operational references, and additional context available upon request during a structured interview process.</p>
    <div class="ftcopy">© 2025 Ramil Kazimov · All Rights Reserved</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
const obs=new IntersectionObserver((e)=>{e.forEach((en,i)=>{if(en.isIntersecting){setTimeout(()=>en.target.classList.add('v'),i*55);obs.unobserve(en.target)}})},{threshold:.06});
document.querySelectorAll('.r').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
const ids=document.querySelectorAll('[id]');
const lnks=document.querySelectorAll('.nlinks a');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{let c='';ids.forEach(s=>{if(window.scrollY>=s.offsetTop-80)c=s.id});lnks.forEach(a=>a.classList.toggle('on',a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+c))},{passive:true});
</script>
</body>
</html>
